title: Orchestrator interop: board & CLI visibility for Claude-orchestrated runs
description: The repo is now driven exclusively by Claude Code as orchestrator (per docs/claude-code-swarm-architecture.md and docs/design/execution-model-v2-epic-chaining-and-learning-loop.md). The tk CLI and both boards (local tk board, cloud) predate this and have observability gaps: the open->in_progress transition emits no activity event and never sets started_at (breaking the documented stale-recovery procedure in skills/ticks/references/claude-runner.md:356), the activity feed cannot distinguish agent actions from human actions, and cloud-side operations lose requester identity. This epic wires the claim/start signal through the CLI and store, surfaces it on the board, fixes actor attribution, and updates the orchestration skill docs to match.
notes:
2026-06-10 19:33 - RETRO REPORT (epic close):
Learnings promoted — .tick/learnings.md: worker-test isolation rule (full suite crashes workerd; run files via npx vitest run in isolation; tracked xdq) + dual schema codegen rule (make codegen-go AND scripts/build-ui.sh on any schemas/websocket change). Skill (claude-runner.md): base-branch field semantics clarified (= fork/merge-back branch, not the epic branch); TK_ACTOR caveats qualified.
Verification (outside-in, per scope item) — start signal: VERIFIED e2e with built binary (claim sets started_at + start entry, re-claim idempotent, release clears). Actor attribution: VERIFIED e2e (start/update/close entries carry TK_ACTOR; owner fallback intact). Elapsed badge: tests + bundle inspection. Cloud roadmap: 31 unit tests incl. manual-gating fidelity fix. Cloud actor: Go tests + isolated worker test 3/3. Skill docs: reviewer-verified against merged code.
Drift — none beyond review findings; all 4 should-fixes fixed in-branch. Accepted tech debt: opaque userId attribution (email resolution = noted enhancement on xps), per-card 30s timer pattern, dead defensive catch in roadmap.ts, label changes emit no activity, approve/reject surface as close/note (documented).
Follow-ups — xdq: worker test env crash + stale /agent auth tests + worker tests missing from CI.
Roadmap proposals — none; runner-removal epic (vuq) ready except 0u6 awaits human decision on wwv.
Integration status — awaiting PR: https://github.com/pengelbrecht/ticks/pull/11 (CI gate on PRs).
closed_reason: Completed: all 6 implementation ticks + final review + retro done via Claude orchestration; awaiting PR #11 to main. Retro report in epic notes.
